name: Salat Tangiers
recipeIngredient: 1 Cup Green Beans, cut or wax beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine couscous and salt in a large bowl. Stir in boiling water. Cover and let sit for 5-10 minutes, stirring occasionally to fluff.
2. Steam carrots, bell pepper, and beans separately until barely tender (you can steam them all together).
3. Add the steamed vegetables to the couscous mixture.
4. Stir in red onions, currants, and almonds.
5. Whisk together the marinade ingredients.
6. Toss the couscous and vegetable mixture with the marinade.
7. Chill for at least one hour before serving.
